final_answer: Probably yes. With CAC around $1,000 and first-30-day gross profit around $10,000, payback is about 1 month, so acquisition cost itself does not look like the main bottleneck. The more likely constraint is volume or conversion: can you consistently create enough qualified opportunities, and can the offer stack convert them without Lisa becoming the delivery bottleneck? My next action would be to pressure-test acquisition capacity and close rate before trying to optimize CAC.
